title: Delicate Burrito Breakfast
description: A delicate breakfast twist on a classic burrito, featuring a runny egg and confit.
instructions: Heat the confit in a small pan over medium heat.
Meanwhile, toast the tortilla in a dry pan for about 30 seconds on each side.
Crack the egg into the pan with the confit and scramble it lightly.
Warm the tortilla slightly on both sides.
Add a spoonful of the confit mixture to the center of the tortilla.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla over the filling, then the sides, and finally the top half.
Serve the burrito hot with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro, if desired.
